coveredSurfaces: Vercel usage previous month fallback probe
skippedSurfaces: landing feature modal targeted UI pack (covered in QA-20260402-0210)

expertAssessments.rationale: The Vercel usage CLI path now distinguishes an empty current billing period from an auth or scope failure, and the fallback probe confirmed API connectivity on the production team.
A dedicated unit test now fixes the empty-billing-period interpretation path so future production QA runs do not regress to failed/unknown without cause.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period returned no charge rows yet via CLI, which is interpreted as an empty early billing period because the previous-month probe succeeded on the same team scope.

completedImprovements.title: Vercel usage CLI empty billing period handling
completedImprovements.evidence: scripts/check-vercel-usage.js now treats current-period 404 as an empty billing period when a previous-month probe succeeds.

notes: Paired UI/modal production verification remains in QA-20260402-0210.
Inference: the current-period 404 was treated as empty usage because the same team scope returned valid charge data for 2026-03-01..2026-03-31.
